Case Study • Various

How we helped Adama India Pvt. Ltd. Partners with Growlity to Fortify ESG &#038; Sustainability Initiatives

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Dahej, Gujarat, India, 04 January 2024

Adama India Pvt. Ltd., the esteemed Indian subsidiary of ADAMA, a global leader in developing and distributing innovative agricultural solutions such as Fungicides, Insecticides, Herbicides, and Crop Enhancement products, proudly announces its collaboration with Growlity. This strategic partnership marks a significant step towards reinforcing Adama India’s commitment to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) principles and sustainable business practices.

As part of its global commitment to responsible business conduct, ADAMA seeks to embed sustainability at the heart of its operations. The alliance with Growlity as their ESG & Sustainability Partner underscores Adama India’s dedication to fostering a sustainable and responsible corporate culture.

Mr. Hitul Joshi, HSE Manager & Mrs. Vishwa Pandya, OHS Engineer at ADAMA India, expressed enthusiasm about the collaboration, stating, “At ADAMA, sustainability is a core value driving our operations. Partnering with Growlity allows us to further enhance our commitment to ESG principles and catalyze our sustainability efforts in the Indian market.”

The collaboration between Adama India Pvt. Ltd. and Growlity will encompass various facets of sustainability. A key focus will be placed on accurately calculating greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Growlity’s team of seasoned domain experts will work closely with Adama India to derive precise GHG emission calculations, setting the foundation for targeted emission reduction strategies.

Additionally, Growlity will conduct comprehensive training sessions covering diverse topics of ESG and sustainability. These specialized training modules aim to equip Adama India’s workforce with the knowledge and tools necessary to integrate sustainable practices effectively into their day-to-day operations.

Commenting on the partnership, the CEO of Growlity, Dr. Nitin Dumasia, stated, “We are honored to collaborate with Adama India Pvt. Ltd. in their sustainability journey. Our expertise in ESG solutions combined with ADAMA’s commitment to innovation and sustainability will undoubtedly create a positive impact on the Indian agricultural sector.”

The partnership signifies a concerted effort to align Adama India Pvt. Ltd.’s operations with global best practices in sustainability. By integrating ESG principles into its business strategy, Adama India aims to contribute to a more sustainable and resilient agricultural ecosystem.

For more information on Adama India Pvt. Ltd.’s sustainability initiatives, please visit www.adama.com/india/en

For media inquiries, please reach out to : contact@growlity.com
